title: Main-GUI.ps1 — Test-Path $null crashes in 6 locations when Get-ProjectPath returns null (P022)
description:
When $script:_PathRegistry is empty (see SIN-20260413-PATHREGISTRY-FORCE-REIMPORT-RESET), Get-ProjectPath returns $null. Six locations in Main-GUI.ps1 use the returned path directly in Test-Path without a null guard, causing runtime crashes:

1. Get-SecurityChecklistRows (~L7732): 'if (Test-Path $assistedSascModulePath)' — $null from Get-ProjectPath SascModule
2. Get-SecurityChecklistRows (~L7735): 'if (Test-Path $sascAdaptersModulePath)' — $null from Get-ProjectPath SascAdapters
3. Get-SecurityChecklistRows (~L7755): 'if (Test-Path $configPath)' — $null from Get-ProjectPath SascConfig
4. Line ~9822: 'if (-not (Test-Path $scriptFoldersConfigPath))' — $null when path registry empty
5. Get-ScriptFoldersConfig (~L3257): Test-Path on $scriptFoldersConfigPath without null guard
6. Save-ScriptFoldersConfig (~L3274): Set-Content on $scriptFoldersConfigPath without null guard
reported_by: User (Security Checklist throws after clicking button; Script Folders config section fails to display)
resolution: Added [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace() guards before all six Test-Path/Set-Content calls. Get-SecurityChecklistRows now returns 'path unavailable' status (instead of crashing) for null paths from Get-ProjectPath. Get-ScriptFoldersConfig returns $null early; Save-ScriptFoldersConfig logs Warning and returns $false early when path is null.
detection_method: User-reported Security Checklist crash. Code review of Get-SecurityChecklistRows confirmed three bare Test-Path calls on Get-ProjectPath return values. Code review of script folder config section confirmed three more.
root_cause: Defensive null-checking was not applied to Get-ProjectPath return values before use in Test-Path/Set-Content. Assumed path registry would always be populated post-startup. See SIN-20260413-PATHREGISTRY-FORCE-REIMPORT-RESET for root cause of null returns.
exception_message: Test-Path: Cannot bind argument to parameter 'Path' because it is null.
fix_pattern:
Wrap all Get-ProjectPath return values in IsNullOrWhiteSpace check before any Test-Path/Set-Content/Join-Path:
  if (-not [string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($path) -and (Test-Path $path)) { ... }

remedy_tracking.notes: Fixed in session 2026-04-13. All 6 crash sites guarded.
